beforeSnapshot.name: testRoutePlanEndpoint

afterSnapshot.name: testRoutePlanEndpoint

verification.description: POST /api/route-plan returns a well-formed riskScore per leg (or null) alongside warnings/riskLevel.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: The endpoint now returns a per-leg riskScore; the integration test must assert it is null or a well-formed LegRiskScore alongside the existing geometry/warnings.
implementation: Extends the existing per-leg assertions with riskScore shape checks (score 0..100, 4-tier level, headline string, 5 factors each with key/label/icon/points/max/detail).
